content: Wangkanai.Detection (v8.20.0, released 2025-07-17, targets net8.0+, 6.1M total downloads) detects device type, browser, engine, platform, and crawler. Wangkanai.Responsive (v7.14.0, released 2025-07-17, targets net8.0+, 188.6K downloads) depends on Wangkanai.Detection and adds IViewLocationExpander-based mobile view resolution. View suffix convention: Index.Mobile.cshtml, Index.Tablet.cshtml, with Index.cshtml as desktop fallback. Registration: services.AddResponsive() plus existing AddSession(); middleware: app.UseSession() then app.UseResponsive() BEFORE app.UseRouting(). IDetectionService can be injected to check _detectionService.Device.Type == DeviceType.Mobile. The two packages are separate NuGet packages; Responsive pulls in Detection as a transitive dependency.
